reviews.review_msg: Love beau, super nice, super caring, super engaging.

i have had beau as a TA for two classes (COGS100 and PSYC352) and he has just been the best for both. very easy to contact and gives in depth feedback on all assignments. it's really hard to find TAs who aren't praying on my downfall at SFU, but beau has always been very caring and supportive of his students!

Lectures are vague and she does not fully explain any concept properly. Instead, you are left on your own to read multiple long papers and refer to previous psychology courses to understand the material. She definitely lights up talking about her time overseas for research but lectures are uninspiring. I barely learnt anything substantial from this

The worst class I've taken at SFU! The course consisted of a midterm, term paper, and a final. We were given barely any instruction in order to write the 10-page paper (worth 30%) and her midterm/final tests questions were not based off of course content at all! Do not take this course!

The material is interesting but the delivery of this course is horrible, everything is vague and she doesn't stick to what the syllabus says which shows she has little respect for her students. I'm a good student I have a 3.5 GPA I'm telling you to avoid this class if you can.
